item.title: What color is a black hole?
item.description: I talk about why things appear to be the color black. Then I talk about what color a black hole is and how they can appear different colors at different sizes?

media:content.media:title: What color is a black hole?
media:content.media:description: I talk about why things appear to be the color black. Then I talk about what color a black hole is and how they can appear different colors at different sizes?

item.title: Biggest water drops
item.description: In this video I show you how to make giant water drops! In a previous video I showed you how to slice water in half, now I show you how to make giant water drops!

media:content.media:title: Biggest water drops
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how to make giant water drops! In a previous video I showed you how to slice water in half, now I show you how to make giant water drops!

item.title: The Butterfly Effect explained in real life
item.description: The Butterfly Effect in real life with mirrors and a laser

media:content.media:title: The Butterfly Effect explained in real life
media:content.media:description: The Butterfly Effect in real life with mirrors and a laser

item.title: They call me the Tin Man
item.description: Watch how zinc ions form zinc metal on a cathode in real time

media:content.media:title: They call me the Tin Man
media:content.media:description: Watch how zinc ions form zinc metal on a cathode in real time

item.title: Sorry astronauts, helium falls in space
item.description: I show you what helium balloons do if there is no air around them

media:content.media:title: Sorry astronauts, helium falls in space
media:content.media:description: I show you what helium balloons do if there is no air around them

item.title: The accidental discovery that changed physics
item.description: Exploring black fire and the Anomalous Zeeman effect

media:content.media:title: The accidental discovery that changed physics
media:content.media:description: Exploring black fire and the Anomalous Zeeman effect

item.title: Fire that freezes ​
item.description: In this video I show you how to make freezing fire that is so cold that it freezes things instead of burns them! I use cooled helium to flow past a high voltage electrode.

media:content.media:title: Fire that freezes ​
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how to make freezing fire that is so cold that it freezes things instead of burns them! I use cooled helium to flow past a high voltage electrode.

item.title: Can you jump off a train without falling?
item.description: The physics of jumping off a moving train

media:content.media:title: Can you jump off a train without falling?
media:content.media:description: The physics of jumping off a moving train

item.title: Boiling metal to make a plasma
item.description: In this video I show you how I vaporize sodium in a vacuum to make a sodium vapor plasma

media:content.media:title: Boiling metal to make a plasma
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how I vaporize sodium in a vacuum to make a sodium vapor plasma

item.title: Vacuum chamber inception
item.description: In this video I show you what happens when you put a vacuum chamber in a vacuum chamber! This is the vacuum chamber inception video! You get some counter-intuitive results especially with the vacuum gauge! I also unbox the first Action Lab Box and show you what you will be getting! I am so excited to get these in your hands!

media:content.media:title: Vacuum chamber inception
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what happens when you put a vacuum chamber in a vacuum chamber! This is the vacuum chamber inception video! You get some counter-intuitive results especially with the vacuum gauge! I also unbox the first Action Lab Box and show you what you will be getting! I am so excited to get these in your hands!
